name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES
    state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: state[i] = "idle"

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = "idle"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = "trying"
        /\ \A j \in 1..N: j # i => state[j] # "critical"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = "critical"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: state[i] \in {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* fork ownership: forks[i] = j means philosopher j holds fork i, 0 means free *)
(* philosopher state: state[i] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forks ∈ [1..N -> 0..N]
  /\ state ∈ [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
  /\ forks[1..N] ⊆ 0..N
  /\ state[1..N] ⊆ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"

Eating(i) == state[i] = "eating"

Thinking(i) == state[i] = "thinking"

LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == 
  /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = 0
  /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = 0

TakeForks(i) == 
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == 
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = 0, ![RightFork(i)] = 0]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

HungryToEating(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ TakeForks(i)

EatingToThinking(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ PutForks(i)

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    (HungryToEating(i) \/ EatingToThinking(i))

Spec == 
  /\ TypeOK
  /\ Init
  /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, representing the queue slots.
   head and tail are indices into q, ranging from 0 to K-1.
   size is the number of elements currently in the queue. *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1, Nat)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
  /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1, Nat)
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ size = 0

Producer == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \bmod K
  /\ q' = Subst(q, head, 1) \* Enqueue 1 at head
  /\ tail' = tail
  /\ size' = size + 1

Consumer == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = head
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \bmod K
  /\ q' = Subst(q, tail, 0) \* Dequeue at tail
  /\ size' = size - 1

Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == 
  /\ Init
  /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>
  /\ TypeOK

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N \in Nat

VARIABLES
    state,          \* state[p] is the local state of process p
    channel,        \* channel[p][q] is the FIFO channel from p to q
    recorded,       \* recorded[p] is TRUE if process p has recorded its state
    snapshot,       \* snapshot[p] is the recorded state of process p
    channelState,   \* channelState[p][q] is the recorded state of channel from p to q
    markerSent,     \* markerSent[p][q] is TRUE if process p has sent a marker to q

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ channel \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]]
          /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ snapshot \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ channelState \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]]
          /\ markerSent \in [1..N -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [p \in 1..N |-> [q \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
        /\ recorded = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ snapshot = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channelState = [p \in 1..N |-> [q \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
        /\ markerSent = [p \in 1..N |-> [q \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]

(* Sending a marker from process p to q *)
SendMarker(p, q) == /\ recorded[p] = TRUE
                     /\ markerSent[p][q] = FALSE
                     /\ channel[p][q] = Append(channel[p][q], "marker")
                     /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![p][q] = TRUE]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, snapshot, channelState, channel>>

(* Receiving a marker at process q from p *)
ReceiveMarker(p, q) == /\ channel[p][q] = <<>> \* no marker in channel
                           /\ recorded[q] = FALSE
                           /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![p][q] = channel[p][q]]
                           /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![q] = state[q]]
                           /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![q] = TRUE]

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
  Keys, Values

VARIABLES
  store

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to a default value *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> defaultVal]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \E k \in Keys, v \in Values :
    /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

    CHUNK_SIZE,
    FILE_SIZE

    sentChunks,          \* Set of indices of chunks that have been sent
    retransmitCount,     \* Map from chunk index to number of retransmissions
    channel,             \* Set of chunks currently in the channel
    ackedChunks,         \* Set of indices of chunks that have been acknowledged
    lostChunks,          \* Set of indices of chunks that have been lost

TypeOK ==
    /\ fileChunks \in Seq(Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE))
    /\ sentChunks \in SUBSET 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ retransmitCount \in [1..Len(fileChunks) -> Nat]
    /\ channel \in SUBSET 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ ackedChunks \in SUBSET 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ lostChunks \in SUBSET 1..Len(fileChunks)

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..Len(FILE_SIZE) |-> [j \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE |-> i*CHUNK_SIZE + j]]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Len(fileChunks) |-> 0]
    /\ channel = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ lostChunks = {}

SendChunk ==
    /\ sentChunks \subset 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ chunkIndex \in 1..Len(fileChunks) \sentChunks

    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![chunkIndex] = retransmitCount[chunkIndex] + 1]
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks

RetransmitChunk ==
    /\ sentChunks \subset 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ chunkIndex \in 1..Len(fileChunks) \sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[chunkIndex] < MAX_RETRIES

    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![chunkIndex] = retransmitCount[chunkIndex] + 1]
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks

ReceiveAck ==
    /\ channel \neq {}
    /\ chunkIndex \in channel
    /\ channel' = c

  clocks,     \* Vector of clock values per node
  offsets     \* Vector of integer offsets per node

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* --algorithm Peterson
   VARIABLES flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE], turn = 1

   PROCESS P1
   DO
      flag[1] := TRUE;
      turn := 2;
      WHILE flag[2] & turn = 2 DO
         (* busy wait *)
      END;
      (* critical section *)
      flag[1] := FALSE;
   END;

   PROCESS P2
   DO
      flag[2] := TRUE;
      turn := 1;
      WHILE flag[1] & turn = 1 DO
         (* busy wait *)
      END;
      (* critical section *)
      flag[2] := FALSE;
   END;
*)

Init == 
   /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
   /\ turn = 1

Next == 
   \E i \in 1..2 :
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
      /\ turn' = IF i = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 1
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
      /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

TypeOK == 
   /\ flag \in [1..2 |-> BOOLEAN]
   /\ turn \in 1..2

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES
    subscribers,  \* Mapping from topic to set of subscriber IDs
    messages,     \* Mapping from topic to sequence of messages
    nextMsgId,    \* Next message ID to assign
    nextSubId,    \* Next subscriber ID to assign

(* Type definitions *)
Topic == [topicName: STRING]
Message == [msgId: Nat, topic: Topic, content: STRING]
SubscriberId == Nat
PublisherId == Nat

(* Helper functions *)
IsTopic(t) == t \in DOMAIN messages
IsSubscriber(s) == s \in DOMAIN subscribers

(* Initialization *)
Init ==
    /\ subscribers = [t \in Topic : {}]
    /\ messages = [t \in Topic : <<>>]
    /\ nextMsgId = 1
    /\ nextSubId = 1

(* Actions *)
RegisterSubscriber(t) ==
    /\ IsTopic(t)
    /\ nextSubId \in Nat
    /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![t] = subscribers[t] \cup {nextSubId}]
    /\ nextSubId' = nextSubId + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, nextMsgId>>

PostMessage(t, c) ==
    /\ IsTopic(t)
    /\ nextMsgId \in Nat
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], [msgId |-> nextMsgId, topic |-> t, content |-> c])]
    /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextSubId>>

DeliverMessage(t, m) ==
    /\ IsTopic(t)
    /\ m \in messages[t]
    /\ subscribers[t] \in SUBSET SubscriberId
    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextSubId, nextMsgId>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \E t \in Topic : RegisterSubscriber(t)
    \/ \E t \in Topic, c \in STRING : PostMessage(t, c)
    \/ \E t \in Topic, m \in messages[t] : DeliverMessage(t, m)

(* Specification *)
Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET SubscriberId]
    /\ messages \in [Topic -> Seq(Message)]
    /\ nextMsgId \in Nat
    /\ nextSubId \in Nat
